docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JAIME ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $135.00 SERVED MAR-31-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JAIME
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) STEVEN ADELSON FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-23-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE (STEVEN ADELSON) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAIME RODRIGUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUIS VILLALOBOS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-23-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF TEASURER/TAX COLLECTOR (LUIS VILLALOBOS) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAIME RODRIGUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JAIME $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,135.00, JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF CCSF AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT JAIME RODRIGUEZ. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JAIME
